title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 04 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 04 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 04 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 04/03/2025
Today, iron ore futures continued last week's downward trend. The most-traded I2505 contract closed at 779.5 yuan/mt, down 2.81%for the day. Traders showed moderate willingness to sell, while steel mills purchased as needed, mainly adopting a high-frequency, low-volume procurement strategy.
